center.name: Mount Cameroon and Bioko montane forests
center.summary: Mount Cameroon and Bioko montane forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Mountain saw-wing，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Mount Cameroon and Bioko montane forests
